recommendations.title: Untitled Issue
recommendations.description: Split the object literal across multiple lines with one property per line to match the dominant formatting style and ease future diffs.

recommendations.title: Untitled Issue
recommendations.description: Re-evaluate whether src/index.ts and other index files should be excluded from coverage. If they contain significant logic or re-export wiring that could break, consider including them in coverage or adding explicit tests while documenting the rationale for any exclusions.
